title: Data Mart Engineer
description:
Roles & Responsibilities:

  • Maintain and develop the Global Marketing BI dashboards (Tableu, MSSQL).
  • Manage CRM data integrity and develop reporting to track campaign performance and customer behavior (Adobe Campaign)
  • Responsible for laying the foundations for the acquisition, storage, transformation, and management of data.
  • Advise project manager on data infrastructure needs while assisting with data-related technical issues.
  • Design, develop and modify relational and multidimensional database structures, relationships, data flows and data interfaces.
  • Develop ETL (extract, transform, load) processes to help extract and manipulate data from multiple sources.
  • Prepare plans for all ETL (Extract/Transformation/Load) procedures and architectures.
  • Prepare raw data in Data Mart into a consumable dataset for both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
  • Monitor data systems performance and implement optimization strategies.
  • Maintain and optimize the data infrastructure required for accurate extraction, transformation, and loading of data from a wide variety of data sources.
  • Monitor and tune data loads and queries.
  • Validate results and create business dashboards in Tableu.
  • Support CRM campaign operations with end-to-end data management, including audience segmentation, data integration, data export/import, count validation, data quality, and compliance with data governance.
  • Generate regular campaign performance reports and analyse customer engagement trends across channels.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor's degree in computer science, or a related field.
  • Proven experience in Tableau, MSSQL, and Azure architecture
  • Experience with Adobe Campaign, AEP and PowerBI is a plus
  • Advance level in Structured Query Language (SQL)
  • Advanced knowledge and experience in relational databases, SQL.
  • Experience in database design and modeling for data warehouse and business intelligence applications, including relational database structures and normal forms.
  • 2+ Project experience with designing and building highly scalable Extract, Transform, and Load (ETL) processes and concepts.
  • Able to analyze existing SQL queries for performance improvements
  • Analytical skills to monitor performance and identify problems with in the database
  • Develop, implement and optimize stored procedures and functions using T-SQL and meet performance requirements
  • Defining the detailed database design, including tables, indexes, views, constraints, triggers, stored procedures, and other database-specific constructs needed to store, retrieve, and delete persistent objects.
  • Detail-oriented and organized, with excellent time management skills.
  • A team player with strong interpersonal skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with diverse teams.
  • Ability to meet deadlines, self-management skills,
  • Positive attitude, pleasant and energetic personality, and service mindedness
  • A team player with strong interpersonal skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with diverse teams.

Qualifications:

Work experience with Tableau and Adobe Campaign



Please only apply via direct application on this MyCareersFuture website.








Or, email your CV and indicate Job Title as email subject to the following: hr.group@samsung.com


Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
